other_observers: Jeannie Mitchell , Jackie Heyda , Aaron Shippe; No , I believe Doug Falkner was the original finder a week before .
specific_location: Jackson Reservoir , SW corner near inlet canal stream.
description: Unique shape and color , makes this an obvious ID. Medium size shorebird , dark black eye on buffy face , underparts also buffy with black spotting on breast , yellow legs , dark scaly back with white fringing indicates that these birds were juveniles .Behaviors: In a small flock of Baird's would run a few paces and then peck at the mud surface for insects with their relatively short black straight bill. Did not probe below surface,Call: None HeardPlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
